sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمْتُ الْمِتْرُو لِلتَّنَقُّلِ دَاخِلَ الْمَدِينَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristio sam metro za kretanje unutar velikog grada.
sentences.translationEn: I used the metro to get around the big city.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ بِطَاقَةً مَغْنَاطِيسِيَّةً مِنْ آلَةِ التَّذَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam magnetnu karticu na automatu za karte.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a magnetic card from the ticket machine.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرْتُ فِي خَرِيطَةِ الْخُطُوطِ وَاخْتَرْتُ الْخَطَّ الصَّحِيحَ.
sentences.translation: Pogledao sam mapu linija i izabrao pravi pravac.
sentences.translationEn: I looked at the line map and chose the right direction.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتِ الْقِطَارَةُ بَعْدَ دَقِيقَتَيْنِ وَكَانَتْ مُكْتَظَّةً بِالرُّكَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Voz je stigao nakon dvije minute i bio je pun putnika.
sentences.translationEn: The train arrived after two minutes and was packed with passengers.

sentences.arabic: نَزَلْتُ فِي الْمَحَطَّةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ وَوَجَدْتُ الطَّرِيقَ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sišao sam na pravoj stanici i lako pronašao put.
sentences.translationEn: I got off at the right station and found the way easily.
